mapper.select: SELECT t.TRD_SN FROM TRADE t JOIN PRODUCT p ON p.PRD_SN = t.PRD_SN WHERE t.TRD_SN = #{tradeId} AND t.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0001' AND p.PRD_TRD_METHOD_CD = 'TRDC0010' FOR UPDATE

SELECT r.CH_RM_SN AS roomId, t.TRD_SN AS tradeId, r.CH_RM_STATUS_CD AS roomStatus FROM CHAT_ROOM r JOIN TRADE t ON t.TRD_SN = r.TRD_SN JOIN PRODUCT p ON p.PRD_SN = t.PRD_SN WHERE r.CH_RM_SN = #{roomId} AND t.TRD_TYPE_CD = 'TRDC0001' AND p.PRD_TRD_METHOD_CD = 'TRDC0010' AND (t.SLLR_USR_SN = #{userId} OR t.BYPR_USR_SN = #{userId})

SELECT m.CH_MSG_SN AS messageId, CASE WHEN m.USR_SN = #{userId} THEN 'ME' ELSE 'COUNTERPART' END AS senderType, m.CH_MSG_CN AS content, m.CH_MSG_REG_DT AS sentAt, CASE WHEN m.CH_MSG_READ_YN = 'Y' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS `read` FROM CHAT_MESSAGE m WHERE m.CH_RM_SN = #{roomId} ORDER BY m.CH_MSG_REG_DT ASC, m.CH_MSG_SN ASC

SELECT m.CH_MSG_SN AS messageId, CASE WHEN m.USR_SN = #{userId} THEN 'ME' ELSE 'COUNTERPART' END AS senderType, m.CH_MSG_CN AS content, m.CH_MSG_REG_DT AS sentAt, CASE WHEN m.CH_MSG_READ_YN = 'Y' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS `read` FROM CHAT_MESSAGE m WHERE m.CH_MSG_SN = #{messageId}
